name: Sure.jell® Cranberry Walnut Jam
recipeIngredient: 5 cups prepared fruit (5 cups cranberries and 2 cups water)
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil jars on a rack in a large pot filled with water for 10 minutes.
2. Place flat lids in a saucepan with water. Bring to boil, then remove from heat. Let jars and lids stand in hot water until ready to fill. Drain well before filling.
3. In a large saucepan, place cranberries and water. Bring to boil. Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 10 minutes. Pour the mixture into a 6- or 8-quart saucepot. Stir in walnuts.
4. Measure sugar into a medium bowl (scraping excess with spatula to level). Stir fruit pectin into the fruit in the saucepot. Add margarine.
5. Bring the mixture to a full rolling boil over high heat, stirring constantly. Quickly stir in all of the sugar. Return to a full rolling boil and maintain it for exactly 1 minute, stirring constantly. Remove from heat.
6. Skim any foam off with a metal spoon.
7. Ladle jam quickly into prepared jars, filling to within 1/8 inch of the top. Wipe jar rims and threads. Cover with two-piece lids. Screw bands tightly.
8. Invert jars for 5 minutes, then turn upright. After jars are cool, check seals. OR follow the water bath method recommended by USDA.
